summary: The user is considering installing electric fencing for their rural property and seeks information on types of fencing, energizers, and maintenance. They express a preference for high-tensile wire and solar-powered energizers, while also inquiring about battery life and fencing materials.
facts: The user is looking to install electric fencing on a large area of their rural property. The user is leaning towards using high-tensile wire for their fencing system. The user is considering solar-powered energizers for their electric fencing system. The user is concerned about the battery life of solar-powered energizers, especially during winter months. The user is interested in the maintenance required to keep their electric fencing system running smoothly. The user plans to use a higher-capacity battery for their solar-powered energizer to ensure sufficient power. The user is aware that deep cycle batteries typically last 5-10 years depending on usage and maintenance. The user is considering the durability of fencing materials to withstand elements and animal pressure. The user is advised to regularly check the energizer's voltage and inspect the fence for damage. The user is informed that cleaning the fence and checking wire tension should be done monthly.
